description: Natural-arm sibling of data/agents/meta-what-can-you-build.json. Gold mirrors the exam case (out-of-scope): a capabilities question should be answered directly, with no build activity. No skill-load expectation — answering a product question does not require intent classification.
processExpectations: The agent answers the question directly by describing the kinds of automations it can build, and does not create a workflow or an agent or start any build activity.
